raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 3,
    "R1.2": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the main concept but oversimplifies the consensus in the optimization community.",
    "R1.2": "Engages the argument chain and identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the 'consensus' in the optimization community) but not for others.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested.",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (internal inconsistency on the role of noise).",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the main concept but oversimplifies the consensus in the optimization community.
rationale.R1.2: Engages the argument chain and identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the 'consensus' in the optimization community) but not for others.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (internal inconsistency on the role of noise).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not.
